summary: Full backend + frontend testing of the WorkQuire 3D immersive landing page. All 10 backend tests pass (health, VA/Team inquiry create with email_sent=true via Resend, validation for missing/empty/invalid fields and invalid inquiry_type, GET list sorted desc with no MongoDB _id leak). Frontend tested at 1920x1080 and 320x700 viewports: all required sections render, vanilla Three.js canvas mounts inside hero-3d-canvas-wrapper, VA dialog hides team_size and Team dialog includes it, empty submit is blocked client-side (no POST), valid submit returns 200 and shows inquiry-success + success toast, mobile hamburger menu works with no horizontal overflow at 320px.
critical_code_review_comments: Logger is defined AFTER send_inquiry_email() uses it (logger.warning at line 111 / logger.error at 126 / logger.info at 123). It works only because the function is called later, but if a future refactor calls send_inquiry_email at import time, it will NameError. Move logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger above the helpers.
FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in modern FastAPI — migrate to lifespan handlers when convenient.

Inquiry email currently uses SENDER_EMAIL=onboarding@resend.dev (Resend test sender); in Resend test mode only the verified recipient (deeptuxph2025@gmail.com) will actually receive mail. Add a note to swap to a verified domain sender before going to production.
Backend stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but parses it back to datetime in list_inquiries; consider storing as native BSON datetime for cleaner range queries.
test_credentials: N/A — public landing page, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create a few TEST_-prefixed inquiries in MongoDB during the run (not cleaned up; small payload, acceptable for now).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_workquire_api.py are the regression suite. Frontend dialog flow uses Radix Dialog — closing relies on Escape or the X button (no explicit close test-id). Resend is in TEST mode keyed to deeptuxph2025@gmail.com; email_sent=true is expected for any inquiry. 3D scene uses vanilla three.js (HeroBackground.jsx) instead of R3F because the visual-edits Babel plugin chokes on R3F JSX.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
